description: Canonical catalog for public game assets. Generated Phaser textures are documented separately because they are created at runtime.

images.usage: Robin Chute player portrait medallion for the HUD health display

Soft persistent menu backdrop for main menu, level select, and settings

audio.usage: Level cleared fanfare after Robin crawls into the exit chute
audio.prompt: Short whimsical steampunk level-clear fanfare for a 2D pixel-art platformer. Brass penny-whistle style flourish, tiny clockwork bells, upbeat scrap-metal percussion, warm resolving final chord. No vocals, no big orchestral trailer sound, clean ending.

audio.usage: Game over sting when the player health reaches zero
audio.prompt: Short playful game-over sting for a whimsical steampunk scrapyard platformer. Sagging brass note, soft broken music-box cadence, tiny steam hiss tail, melancholy but not scary. No vocals, no horror impact, clean ending.
Short satisfying UI confirm for a whimsical steampunk pixel-art game: tiny brass lever click followed by soft bell tick, clean and bright, no voice.
Short gentle UI deny sound for a whimsical steampunk pixel-art game: muted brass clunk and tiny spring wobble, non-annoying, no voice.
Quick platformer jump sound with soft boot push-off, small spring twang, and a puff of steam, whimsical steampunk, polished pixel-art feel, no voice.
Short soft landing sound on mossy wooden scrap platform: boot thud, faint board creak, tiny dust puff, whimsical steampunk pixel-art platformer.
Snappy player punch swing for a whimsical steampunk platformer: quick cloth whoosh, small brass gear snap, light impact-ready transient, no heavy gore, no voice.
Cartoony non-vocal hurt sound for a steampunk platformer: soft metal bonk, tiny spring recoil, brief steam sputter, readable but not harsh.
Rewarding scrap pickup sound for a whimsical steampunk pixel-art game: bright gear chime, small coin-like clink, quick upward sparkle, clean and short.
Comical pipe turret firing sound: compressed steam pop, brass valve snap, small cannonball puff, whimsical steampunk, punchy but not explosive.
Small cannonball impact into wood and scrap metal: hollow thunk, tiny bolt rattle, little smoke puff, whimsical steampunk pixel-art game.
Enemy robot hit sound: brass plate clank, loose gears rattling, brief steam leak, playful steampunk, no voice, no gore.
Scavenger bot claw swipe: quick rusty hinge snap, metal claw whoosh, small servo whirr, whimsical scrapyard steampunk, clear attack transient.
Small scavenger robot footstep on wooden scrap platform: light metal foot tap, tiny servo squeak, subtle and loop-friendly, no voice.

audio.usage: Player enters the exit chute cutscene
audio.prompt: Player crawling into a giant brass exit chute: hollow pipe resonance, soft boot scrape, warm steam whoosh upward, whimsical steampunk, satisfying transition.
Short low-health warning pulse for a steampunk HUD: muted pressure gauge tick, tiny alarm bell wobble, urgent but not irritating, no voice.

audio.usage: Softer main game and playground backing loop replacing the sharper v1 track
audio.prompt: Seamlessly loopable soft whimsical steampunk scrapyard adventure music for a 2D pixel-art platformer. Gentle warm marimba and muted pizzicato strings, soft brushed percussion, rounded tuba pulses, mellow accordion pads, tiny clockwork ticks kept quiet in the background. Cozy, curious, playful, and slightly mischievous, but smooth and non-sharp. Avoid bright piercing bells, harsh chiptune leads, shrill whistles, hard transients, cymbal crashes, trailer drums, vocals, and busy high-frequency melodies. Designed to sit under platforming gameplay for a long time without fatigue.

audio.usage: Archived sharper v1 main game and playground backing loop kept for comparison and rollback
audio.prompt: Archived v1: sharper whimsical steampunk scrapyard adventure music generated before the softer replacement.
